sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109516" key="u(pofoi/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφοίνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reddish,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λιβάδες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.25.3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Besant.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
